Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows how effective the drop shot can be on Bass during the extreme heat of Summer.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | When its Hot... Drop Shot!.mp4
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Brent Chapman’s Pro vs Joe -Lazy Lake Shootout
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Pitching and flipping are effective methods to catch Bass in shallow waters, undercover trees, and grass. Shea heads out solo skiff fishing for Bass in Lake Perris. He explains his techniques and tests out a topwater frog lure at dusk.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Flipping and Pitching Lake Perris, CA, Part One
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Kim and his guest, Professional Angler Kevin Vida, demonstrate the attributes of Strike King's "Tour Grade Football Jigs and Ragetail Trailers". Late summer largemouth bass that position along weedlines in the fefatured pattern.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we kick off Season 7 with an unforgettable adventure north of Cochrane, Ontario, on the pristine waters of Pierre Lake. We team up with Mark Froud from Dunn Right Outfitters, an expert in Northern Ontario fishing, to target trophy walleye. Experience the thrill of reeling in massive catches while surrounded by breathtaking wilderness, and gain valuable tips and insights from Mark to enhance your own fishing techniques. This episode sets the tone for a season filled with excitement, exploration, and exceptional angling.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | "Trophy Walleye Adventure on Pierre Lake"
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Are you ready to learn how you can catch Giant Mississippi River perch! In this episode you'll have everything you need to know to do it yourself. We also took a trip over to Warrior boats to see how that build their boats. Hang onto your hineys!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Monster Pre-spawn Perch - Missisippi River
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Retired Colonel Paul Wharton shares his memories of leading his soldiers while teaching his own children the philosophy of “ mission, men and me."
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week on larry smith we head north to lake superior in search of some big ole lakers! Stay Tuned!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Superior Lake Trout
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe- Heads up at Live Oak
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Heads up at Live Oak
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It's our final day of fishing in the beautiful Glacier Bay National Park, and we have one chance left to catch a legendary King Salmon. We also have fun rock fishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing — The Ultimate Alaskan Fishing Charter, Part 3
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James and Troy Lindner portage into a remote Northwest Ontario lake, discovering adventure, walleyes, and smallmouth bass at every turn.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Florida's weedy Lake Okeechobee boasts topwater buzzbait bassin' at its best.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: At Alpena, Michigan, Shaw battles largemouth and smallmouth bass, plus "toothy critters."
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast — Michigan Mixed Bag
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In Episode 3, we navigate the serene waters of the Ivanhoe River, embracing the beauty of spring as we target post-spawn walleye. With rods in hand, we explore the river's productive fishing spots, uncovering the best techniques and tips for a successful catch in this transitional season. From scenic backdrops to thrilling strikes, this episode captures the essence of spring fishing at its finest.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Spring on the Ivanhoe: Post-Spawn Walleye Adventures
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Over the last few weeks, Shea McIntee and the crew have been hanging out in Gustavus, Alaska, the southern gateway to Glacier Bay National Park. Mother Nature has blessed us with lovely weather that has allowed us to observe its incredible surroundings, animals, and whales. Halibut fishing has been off the charts, especially using jigs in shallow water. Today, we saved the best for last and get into one big halibut after another. Stoked on Alaska. Here we go!
Video.title: Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4

Image.alt: Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4
Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4
Stoked on Fishing — Back to Gustavus Alaska, Pt. 4

Video.summary: Paul and Ray return to a remote Northern Ontario lake for the final shoot of the season. Facing a tricky beaver dam crossing, they bring in Dan and Ben for extra hands and safety. The day delivers incredible walleye and bass action, capped off with a shore lunch featuring perfectly seasoned walleye courtesy of Outdoor Flavours.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Last Cast Walleye Pursuit

Video.summary: Fly in with us to Blackbirch Lake with Gray Wood Outfitter for some non stop action
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Spring Walleye fishing on Horwood Lake friendly competition with local anglers using crank baits and jigging.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim explains how to build one of the most effective baits for bass.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dusitn takes on classic Fall conditions explaining the best ways to approach bass throughout the day.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim reviews how to build your own bladed jig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building a Bladed Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join Stoked On Fishing as we embark on a thrilling 6-day fishing expedition to the enchanted Island of Puerto Rico. Nestled along the west coast, we'll be based in the charming fishing town of La Pargueta and fishing along the west coast locations of Cabo Rojo and Rincon. Get ready for an unforgettable adventure filled with wide-open offshore and inshore fishing. Stoked On Puerto Rico
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | A Fisherman's Paradise: Stoked on Puerto Rico, Part Three
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin fishes a finesse topwater bait for bass in Early Summer
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A few years back, we rallied up with my buddy Chris Atkins who owns and operates Central America fishing. He told me, Shea, you have to do a Stoked On Fishing Charters Panama trip and fish at Coiba National Park. It's the largest island in Central America, next to the world-famous Hannibal Bank. Needless to say, we rallied up the troops and made our way down south; it's only six hours from LAX our first Adventure was incredible, and that's precisely why we're returning for our second time.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Stoked on Coiba National Park, Panama: Part Four
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks with the most celebrated mind in Bass Fishing, Drew Gill. In depth conversation about his forward-facing sonar set up and strategy.
Video.title: Episode 1
